# Ship.Tires

Ship.Tires is a US-based online tire retailer offering free delivery on every order to all 50 states. The store carries 21 tire brands, 80+ models, and 800+ sizes for cars, trucks, and SUVs. Tires ship to your door or directly to a local installer in 3-7 business days. Call or text (279) 238-8473 to order.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://ship.tires): Main landing page with tire search by size, vehicle, or brand
- [All Tires](https://ship.tires/tires): Browse all 21 brands and their tire models
- [Locations](https://ship.tires/locations): Free tire delivery to 1,000+ US cities across all 50 states
- [Vehicle Lookup](https://ship.tires/vehicle-lookup): Find compatible tires by year, make, and model
- [Rankings](https://ship.tires/rankings): Tire brand and model rankings
- [Search](https://ship.tires/search): Search tires by size, brand, or category
- [Contact](https://ship.tires/contact): Request a quote or get in touch
- [FAQ](https://ship.tires/faq): Frequently asked questions about ordering and shipping
- [Shipping](https://ship.tires/shipping): Shipping policy and delivery details
- [About](https://ship.tires/about): About Ship.Tires
- [Blog](https://ship.tires/blog): Tire guides, tips, and industry news
- [Racing](https://ship.tires/racing): Motorsport coverage (F1, NASCAR, Le Mans, IndyCar)
- [Racing Tech](https://ship.tires/racing-tech): Technical articles on racing tire technology

## Tire Brands

Michelin, Goodyear, Bridgestone, Continental, Pirelli, Hankook, Cooper, Firestone, BFGoodrich, Yokohama, Toyo, Falken, General Tire, Kumho, Nexen, Nitto, Dunlop, Maxxis, Ironman, Sumitomo

## Tire Categories

All-Season, Winter/Snow, Performance, All-Terrain, Touring, Truck & SUV, Highway, Mud-Terrain

## How It Works

1. Find tires by size, vehicle, or brand at https://ship.tires
2. Request a quote or call (279) 238-8473
3. Tires ship free to your door or your local installer
4. Get installed at any tire shop near you

## Location Pages

Pattern: https://ship.tires/locations/{state}/{city}
Example: https://ship.tires/locations/california/los-angeles
Every brand delivered free to every city served.

## API Endpoints

- GET /api/tires/search?size=225/65R17&brand=michelin -- Search tires by size, brand, category, price
- GET /api/tires/brands -- List all 21 brands with models and pricing
- GET /api/locations/search?q=los+angeles -- Find cities with free tire shipping
- GET /api/vehicle/tires?make=Toyota&model=Camry&year=2024 -- Look up tires by vehicle
- GET /api/markdown?path=/tires/michelin -- Get any page as AI-friendly markdown
- POST /api/contact -- Submit a tire inquiry or quote request

## AI & Agent Discovery

- OpenAPI spec: https://ship.tires/openapi.json
- Agent card: https://ship.tires/.well-known/ai-agent.json
- AI plugin: https://ship.tires/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- Full inventory: https://ship.tires/llm-full.txt
- Append .md to any page URL for markdown content

## Contact

- Phone: (279) 238-8473
- Email: info@ship.tires
- Website: https://ship.tires
- Based in Sacramento, CA

## For More Details

See https://ship.tires/llm-full.txt for complete inventory with all brands, models, sizes, pricing, and full city coverage.
